title: Argo CD ApplicationSet Generator Matrix Empty or Error
dataSources: ApplicationSet controller logs as `argocd:applicationset` or filtered `argocd:server`
app: Argo CD ApplicationSet controller → Splunk via Kubernetes log pipeline
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:applicationset" OR (sourcetype="argocd:server" ApplicationSet*)
| search "ApplicationSet" AND ("error" OR "failed" OR "generator")
| stats latest(_time) as t, count by name, namespace
| sort -count
description: Broken generators stop multi-cluster rollouts silently.
value: Catches ApplicationSet failures that would orphan clusters from GitOps updates.
implementation: Tag controller logs with cluster label; correlate with SCM API rate limits.
visualization: Table (ApplicationSet × error count), Single value (open failures).

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)

knownFalsePositives: Pipeline noise during blue/green cutovers, dependency cache cold-starts, or scheduled maintenance windows.
grandmaExplanation: We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.
